message:
fix(robot): correct inbox/outbox queries, search filtering, and urgent counts

- Rewrite inbox query using subqueries instead of JOINs to avoid GROUP BY
  ambiguity with the message_recipients table
- Fix unread_only parameter (was unused as _unread_only); refine inbox
  filtering logic for accurate "show unread only" vs "include all" modes
- Activate kind filter parameter in search (was ignored as _kind)
- Fix urgent message count to only count unread urgent/high-priority
  messages (previously counted all regardless of read status)
- Add created_ts field to outbox entries (was previously always null)

Robot mode inbox, search, and outbox now return correct, complete data
with proper filtering applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
